children.name: ParseInput
children.purpose: Parse and validate the input JSON to extract action, repo, branch
children.behavior: Parse JSON input, validate required fields, return structured action request
postconditions: action_request contains valid action, repo, branch

outputs.name: action_request
outputs.description: Parsed action request with keys: action, repo, branch

acceptance_criteria.description: Given valid JSON input, returns action_request with correct fields

children.name: RouteAction
children.purpose: Route the action to the appropriate child function based on action type
children.behavior: Based on action_request.action, call the corresponding child function
guarantees: only one child function called per request

outputs.name: action_result
outputs.description: Result from the executed action child

acceptance_criteria.description: Given action_request with action 'trigger', calls TriggerBuild

children.name: TriggerBuild
children.purpose: Trigger a new build for a given repo and branch
children.behavior: Check if build already exists for repo+branch, if not create new build record, return build_id
preconditions: build does not already exist for repo+branch
postconditions: new build record created in builds store

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: Check for existing build and create new build record

children.signature: def TriggerBuild(repo: str, branch: str) -> dict

global_vars.description: Check for existing build and create new build record

data_operations.description: Check for existing build and create new build record

constraints.description: Must not create duplicate builds for same repo+branch

acceptance_criteria.description: Given repo and branch, creates build record and returns build_id

children.name: CheckStatus
children.purpose: Check the status of a specific build
children.behavior: Look up build by repo and branch, return status and logs
guarantees: returns error if build not found

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: Look up build record by repo and branch

children.signature: def CheckStatus(repo: str, branch: str) -> dict

global_vars.description: Look up build record by repo and branch

data_operations.description: Look up build record by repo and branch

acceptance_criteria.description: Given repo and branch, returns status and logs

children.name: ListBuilds
children.purpose: List all builds for a given repo
children.behavior: Query builds store for all builds matching repo, return list of build summaries
guarantees: returns empty list if no builds

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: Query all builds for the given repo

outputs.name: build_result
outputs.description: JSON with success and list of builds

global_vars.description: Query all builds for the given repo

data_operations.description: Query all builds for the given repo

acceptance_criteria.description: Given repo, returns list of builds

children.name: CancelBuild
children.behavior: Find build by repo+branch, update status to cancelled, return success
preconditions: build exists and is not already cancelled

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: Find build record and update its status to cancelled

children.signature: def CancelBuild(repo: str, branch: str) -> dict

global_vars.description: Find build record and update its status to cancelled

data_operations.description: Find build record and update its status to cancelled

constraints.description: Must not cancel already cancelled build

acceptance_criteria.description: Given repo and branch, cancels build and returns success

governance_notes: All children preserve Stage 1 semantics and Stage 2 interfaces. Resource fields derived from internal_leaf_accesses. global_vars and data_operations are synchronized for all children that access the builds store. No child accesses artifacts store. ParseInput and RouteAction are pure functions with no resource access.

resource_audit.internal_leaf_mapping_detail: TriggerBuild, CheckStatus, ListBuilds, CancelBuild each have internal_leaf_accesses mapping to builds store with appropriate ops. ParseInput and RouteAction have no internal_leaf_accesses.
resource_audit.global_vars_data_operations_sync_detail: For each child with internal_leaf_accesses, global_vars and data_operations contain identical entries. Children without internal_leaf_accesses have empty arrays.
resource_audit.coverage_detail: All children that access builds store have corresponding global_vars, data_operations, and requested_capabilities. No child accesses artifacts store, so it is not referenced.
